paradigm_routing: binary=True -> LeftRightImagery (CORRECT: events are left/right hand, no BNCI2015-style trap)
window_issue: MOABB interval [0, 3] (len 3s); default tmin=0.5/tmax=3.5 overruns by 1.0s -> use tmax<=3.0 (e.g. window [0.5,3.0]=2.5s)
channels_sfreq: N/A without load (literature: 64ch, 512Hz) -> verify on a 1-subject load
central_strip_v1_preset: NONE for Cho2017 (only BNCI2014_001/BNCI2015_001) -> FBCSPLGGGraph graph branch needs a new 64ch montage preset OR channel-subset mapping
reported_endpoint_if_run: full-LOSO mean + worst bAcc (2-class; the {1,3,8,9} 4-class subset is 2a-specific)
firewall: LOSO source-only + target eval-only (same protocol) — feasible
actions_before_gpu: download Cho2017 (~GB, not in datalake mirror) OR locate a readable mirror
add a central_strip_v1 preset for the Cho2017 montage OR map to a sensorimotor channel subset
CSP-init source-only smoke on Cho2017 montage
